items.title: Segway’s Navimow Summer Sale offers the new i2 AWD series robot mowers at lows from $849 with bonus savings, more
items.summary:
Segway has launched its Navimow US Summer Sale with discounts across some of its new models and some legacy models – plus, the return of the brand’s simulator game on the main sale page here to score an extra $50 savings (just subscribe with an email and play). While we aren’t seeing the new X4 series robots receive discounts (which I’ve been highly impressed by as I stated in my hands-on review), you can find the equally new i206 AWD Robotic Lawn Mower down at $849 shipped (using $50 savings, otherwise $899) with bundle options available on the landing page, which beats out the price seen at Amazon by $50 unless you avoid the game. Normally $999 at full price, this model has only seen one previous discount during its initial launch period to $899, with the sales we’ve seen since not touching the price. Now, during this event, you’re getting the second-ever chance to score $100 savings off the tag for the lowest price we have tracked, which drops even lower with the $50 extra savings. Its i210 AWD counterpart is also down at its $1,049 low with the $50 savings, too. You can browse the full lineup of deals by heading below.
